MOTION TO COMPEL MENTAL EXAMINATION
Off Calendar May-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christine Lee, Esq. of Bertrand, FOx & Elliot 353-0999, appearing for defendant/moving party
Doxzie Ike Ezeife, Esq. of Emeziem & Ohbu, 510/595-7424, appearing for plaintiff/opposing party

RULING:
Argued and TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant's motion to compel plaintiff to submit to further medical testing is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to submit to testing conducted by Dr. Nancy Olesen, not to exceed two hours, at a mutually convenient time and place. Dr. Olesen shall designate a location for the administration of the test as close as practicable to plaintiff's residence or place of business. Counsel for defendant is ordered to pay plaintiff $217.20 upon completion of the testing. In addition, Counsel for defendant will reimburse plaintiff for any travel-related expenses. The examination is to be completed by June 10, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
